title: Receipt Scanning
body: Snap a photo of your receipt and automatically extract expenses.

title: Budget Templates
body: Pre-built budget templates for common scenarios (student, family, freelancer).

title: Recurring Expense Insights
body: Smart detection and optimization suggestions for your subscriptions and recurring bills.

title: Multi-Currency Support
body: Track expenses in multiple currencies with automatic conversion.

title: Shared Family Budgets
body: Collaborate with family members on shared budgets and expense tracking.

title: Investment Tracking
body: Connect and monitor your investment portfolio alongside your budget.
